MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied without prejudice. Original filed motion is unsigned, and indicates the amount owed is $14,058.02 due to credit offset. Declaration of Recovery Specialist Starks, dated March 31, 2010, states amount owed is $14,600.02. Failure to shift the burden of proof regarding amount presently owed. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Ann Mendoza, CSR #6812
